---
title: "Glossary & Index"
---

An alphabetical reference to the mechanisms in this guide and the other names they go by. A bold entry links to the article that covers it; an italic entry redirects an alias to its canonical term.


## #

*The 1:1*: see [One-on-One Scene Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/one-on-one-scene-design.qmd)


## A

**[A Taxonomy of Genre Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/a-taxonomy-of-genre-conventions.qmd)**: Map of genres by reader contract and key IF adaptation.

**[A Taxonomy of Puzzles](articles/puzzles-clues-information/a-taxonomy-of-puzzles.qmd)**: Map of puzzle types: cognitive faculty × experiential job.

*A11y in Games*: see [Accessibility in Live & Interactive Games](articles/players-social-dynamics/accessibility-in-live-and-interactive-games.qmd)

**[Accessibility in Live & Interactive Games](articles/players-social-dynamics/accessibility-in-live-and-interactive-games.qmd)**: The social model; sensory/mobility/cognitive/linguistic access; hints as access.

*Accessible Group Design*: see [Mixed-Ability Groups & Universal Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/mixed-ability-groups-and-universal-design.qmd)

*Accusation Dynamics*: see [Trust, Conformity & Social Pressure](articles/players-social-dynamics/trust-conformity-and-social-pressure.qmd)

*Action Economy*: see [Turn Structure & Action Economy](articles/systems-mechanics/turn-structure-and-action-economy.qmd)

*Affection Systems*: see [Romance & Relationships](articles/story-character-voice/romance-and-relationships.qmd)

*Age Banding*: see [Audience & Age-Targeting](articles/story-character-voice/audience-and-age-targeting.qmd)

**[Aha Moment](articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-aha-moment.qmd)**: The core cognitive reward of puzzle solving.

*Alternate Reality Game (ARG)*: see [The Puzzle Hunt & ARG Tradition](articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-puzzle-hunt-and-arg-tradition.qmd)

*Analysis Paralysis*: see [Turn Structure & Action Economy](articles/systems-mechanics/turn-structure-and-action-economy.qmd)

*Answers as Data*: see [Extraction, Indexing & Meta-Puzzles](articles/puzzles-clues-information/extraction-indexing-and-meta-puzzles.qmd)

*ARG Lineage*: see [The Puzzle Hunt & ARG Tradition](articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-puzzle-hunt-and-arg-tradition.qmd)

*Armchair Treasure Hunt*: see [Treasure & Scavenger Hunts](articles/puzzles-clues-information/treasure-and-scavenger-hunts.qmd)

**[Artefact Design & Document Production](articles/space-props-materiality/artefact-design-and-document-production.qmd)**: Designing and producing narrative objects (feelies, aged documents, dossiers).

*Artefact Modality*: see [Physical vs Digital Puzzle Artefacts](articles/space-props-materiality/physical-vs-digital-puzzle-artefacts.qmd)

*Asymmetric Win Conditions*: see [Faction Design & Asymmetric Objectives](articles/players-social-dynamics/faction-design-and-asymmetric-objectives.qmd)

*Atmosphere*: see [Theme, Immersion & Sensory Environment](articles/space-props-materiality/theme-immersion-and-sensory-environment.qmd)

**[Audience & Age-Targeting](articles/story-character-voice/audience-and-age-targeting.qmd)**: Cross-genre age calibration (distinct from the Children's/YA genre craft).

*Automa*: see [Solo Modes](articles/systems-mechanics/solo-modes.qmd)


## B

*Back-solving*: see Backsolving

**Backsolving**: Deriving a feeder answer from the meta rather than from the feeder itself.

*Baked-In Safety*: see [Safety Systems as Mechanical Layer](articles/systems-mechanics/safety-systems-as-mechanical-layer.qmd)

*Beat Sheets*: see [Beat Taxonomies & Craft Models](articles/structure-pacing/beat-taxonomies-and-craft-models.qmd)

**[Beat Taxonomies & Craft Models](articles/structure-pacing/beat-taxonomies-and-craft-models.qmd)**: Save the Cat / Story Grid / Story Circle; mandatory vs branch-variable beats.

**[Bleed, Aftercare & Debriefing](articles/players-social-dynamics/bleed-aftercare-and-debriefing.qmd)**: Bleed (Emily Care Boss); de-roling, debrief types, bookend rituals.

*Board Game Mechanisms*: see [Boardgame Mechanism Vocabulary](articles/systems-mechanics/boardgame-mechanism-vocabulary.qmd)

**[Boardgame Mechanism Vocabulary](articles/systems-mechanics/boardgame-mechanism-vocabulary.qmd)**: Map of boardgame mechanism families. Tabletop-only reference (Gate-C1).

*Bot Deck*: see [Solo Modes](articles/systems-mechanics/solo-modes.qmd)

*Bottleneck Mitigation*: see [Hint Systems & Recovery](articles/puzzles-clues-information/hint-systems-and-recovery.qmd)

*Bottleneck Players*: see [Team Sizes & the Bottleneck Problem](articles/players-social-dynamics/team-sizes-and-the-bottleneck-problem.qmd)

*Braided Narrative*: see [Parallel Threads & Convergence](articles/structure-pacing/parallel-threads-and-convergence.qmd)

*Branch Budgeting*: see [Scope, Scale & Branching Depth](articles/structure-pacing/scope-scale-and-branching-depth.qmd)

*Branch Voice Auditing*: see [Voice & Register Consistency](articles/story-character-voice/voice-and-register-consistency.qmd)

*Branching Design*: see [Branching Narrative Craft](articles/structure-pacing/branching-narrative-craft.qmd)

**[Branching Narrative Craft](articles/structure-pacing/branching-narrative-craft.qmd)**: Choice architecture; meaningful vs illusory choice; convergence and state-tracking.

*Branching Topologies*: see [IF Graph Structures: A Taxonomy](articles/structure-pacing/if-graph-structures-a-taxonomy.qmd)

*Buy vs Make*: see [Fabrication & Sourcing](articles/space-props-materiality/fabrication-and-sourcing.qmd)


## C

*Calibration Tools*: see Safety Contract

*Calibration Workshop*: see [Pre-Game Workshop Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/pre-game-workshop-design.qmd)

**[Campaign Arc Shapes](articles/structure-pacing/campaign-arc-shapes.qmd)**: Episodic/arc-driven/sandbox/faction-driven/braid campaign shapes.

*Campaign Boardgames*: see [Cooperative & Legacy Genres](articles/systems-mechanics/cooperative-and-legacy-genres.qmd)

*Campaign Models*: see [Campaign Arc Shapes](articles/structure-pacing/campaign-arc-shapes.qmd)

*Campaign Structure*: see [Campaign Arc Shapes](articles/structure-pacing/campaign-arc-shapes.qmd)

**[Canon Management](articles/story-character-voice/canon-management.qmd)**: Fact-continuity; cause chains; who-knows-what-when across branches.

*The Caper*: see [Heist & Caper Patterns](articles/story-character-voice/heist-and-caper-patterns.qmd)

*Challenge Design*: see [Encounter & Challenge Design](articles/systems-mechanics/encounter-and-challenge-design.qmd)

*Character Archetypes*: see [Tropes, Archetypes & Variations](articles/story-character-voice/tropes-archetypes-and-variations.qmd)

**[Character Voice](articles/story-character-voice/character-voice.qmd)**: The hub: idiolect, deep POV, voice under player pressure.

**[Children's & YA Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/childrens-and-ya-conventions.qmd)**: The MG/YA split; the Absent Adult; anti-didacticism.

*Choice Architecture*: see [Branching Narrative Craft](articles/structure-pacing/branching-narrative-craft.qmd)

*Choice-Based Structures*: see [IF Graph Structures: A Taxonomy](articles/structure-pacing/if-graph-structures-a-taxonomy.qmd)

**[Ciphers & Codes](articles/puzzles-clues-information/ciphers-and-codes.qmd)**: Selecting and fairly deploying ciphers.

*Class-as-Identity*: see [Playbook Design](articles/systems-mechanics/playbook-design.qmd)

*The Click*: see [Aha Moment](articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-aha-moment.qmd)

*Closure*: see [Endings & Structural Closure](articles/structure-pacing/endings-and-structural-closure.qmd)

*Clue Chain*: see [Clue Sequencing & Chains](articles/puzzles-clues-information/clue-sequencing-and-chains.qmd)

*Clue Construction*: see [Cluing & Fairness](articles/puzzles-clues-information/cluing-and-fairness.qmd)

*Clue Ordering*: see [Clue Sequencing & Chains](articles/puzzles-clues-information/clue-sequencing-and-chains.qmd)

*Clue Packaging*: see [Physical Clue Formats](articles/space-props-materiality/physical-clue-formats.qmd)

**[Clue Sequencing & Chains](articles/puzzles-clues-information/clue-sequencing-and-chains.qmd)**: The order clues arrive and how one unlocks the next.

**[Cluing & Fairness](articles/puzzles-clues-information/cluing-and-fairness.qmd)**: The fairness contract: every clue sound, the answer reachable.

*Co-op Games*: see [Cooperative & Legacy Genres](articles/systems-mechanics/cooperative-and-legacy-genres.qmd)

*Co-op vs Competitive*: see [Cooperative vs Adversarial Formats](articles/players-social-dynamics/cooperative-vs-adversarial-formats.qmd)

**[Conflict Patterns](articles/story-character-voice/conflict-patterns.qmd)**: The conflict types; desire-vs-obstacle; the stakes ladder.

*Conflict Types*: see [Conflict Patterns](articles/story-character-voice/conflict-patterns.qmd)

*Consent Mechanics*: see Safety Contract

*Consequence Chains*: see [Moral Dilemmas & Consequence Chains](articles/story-character-voice/moral-dilemmas-and-consequence-chains.qmd)

*Consumable vs Reusable Clues*: see [Physical Clue Formats](articles/space-props-materiality/physical-clue-formats.qmd)

*Continuity Management*: see [Canon Management](articles/story-character-voice/canon-management.qmd)

*Control Booth*: see [Cue Management & GM Station](articles/space-props-materiality/cue-management-and-gm-station.qmd)

*Convention Establishment*: see [Teaching Through Play](articles/puzzles-clues-information/teaching-through-play.qmd)

*Conversation Design*: see [Dialogue Craft](articles/story-character-voice/dialogue-craft.qmd)

**[Cooperative & Legacy Genres](articles/systems-mechanics/cooperative-and-legacy-genres.qmd)**: The cooperative genre (quarterbacking) and the legacy genre (permanence).

**[Cooperative vs Adversarial Formats](articles/players-social-dynamics/cooperative-vs-adversarial-formats.qmd)**: The five-format spectrum; quarterbacking and traitor failure modes.

*Countdown*: see Progress Clock

*Crime Fiction*: see [Mystery & Detective Fiction](articles/story-character-voice/mystery-and-detective-fiction.qmd)

*Cryptography Puzzles*: see [Ciphers & Codes](articles/puzzles-clues-information/ciphers-and-codes.qmd)

**[Cue Management & GM Station](articles/space-props-materiality/cue-management-and-gm-station.qmd)**: Audio/lighting automation and the human operator's control surface and hint discipline.

*Cue Stack*: see [Cue Management & GM Station](articles/space-props-materiality/cue-management-and-gm-station.qmd)


## D

*De-roling*: see [Bleed, Aftercare & Debriefing](articles/players-social-dynamics/bleed-aftercare-and-debriefing.qmd)

*Decipherment*: see [Ciphers & Codes](articles/puzzles-clues-information/ciphers-and-codes.qmd)

*Decision Space*: see [Decision Space & Choice Design](articles/systems-mechanics/decision-space-and-choice-design.qmd)

**[Decision Space & Choice Design](articles/systems-mechanics/decision-space-and-choice-design.qmd)**: Meier's interesting decisions; dominant strategies; metagame health. (Choice-architecture in story is Branching Narrative Craft, Family 1.)

*Deck-Building Games*: see [Deckbuilders](articles/systems-mechanics/deckbuilders.qmd)

**[Deckbuilders](articles/systems-mechanics/deckbuilders.qmd)**: The Dominion lineage; the deck as a sculpted strategic object. Tabletop-only reference (Gate-C1).

*Deckbuilding Genre*: see [Deckbuilders](articles/systems-mechanics/deckbuilders.qmd)

*Dependency Graph*: see [Information Architecture](articles/puzzles-clues-information/information-architecture.qmd)

*Designed Peer Pressure*: see [Trust, Conformity & Social Pressure](articles/players-social-dynamics/trust-conformity-and-social-pressure.qmd)

*Designer Presence*: see [Designer-Community Trust in Long-Form Hunts](articles/players-social-dynamics/designer-community-trust-in-long-form-hunts.qmd)

**[Designer-Community Trust in Long-Form Hunts](articles/players-social-dynamics/designer-community-trust-in-long-form-hunts.qmd)**: The verifiability compact and reputation-as-enforcement in long-running hunts.

*Designing for Observers*: see [Spectator-Friendly Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/spectator-friendly-design.qmd)

**[Dialogue Craft](articles/story-character-voice/dialogue-craft.qmd)**: Subtext, beats, said-bookisms; IF dialogue architectures.

*Dialogue Writing*: see [Dialogue Craft](articles/story-character-voice/dialogue-craft.qmd)

*Dice Mechanics*: see [Mechanical Resolution Types](articles/systems-mechanics/mechanical-resolution-types.qmd)

*Diegesis*: see [Diegetic Design](articles/story-character-voice/diegetic-design.qmd)

**[Diegetic Design](articles/story-character-voice/diegetic-design.qmd)**: The IF/narrative home of diegesis; show-the-world-hide-the-gears. (Live/physical sibling: Theme/Immersion, Family 5; boardgame sibling: Theme-Mechanism Integration, Family 6.)

*Diegetic Devices*: see [Digital Props](articles/space-props-materiality/digital-props.qmd)

*Diegetic Gating*: see [Diegetic Design](articles/story-character-voice/diegetic-design.qmd)

*Diegetic UI*: see [Diegetic Design](articles/story-character-voice/diegetic-design.qmd)

*Difficulty Curve*: see [Session Pacing & Energy Management](articles/structure-pacing/session-pacing-and-energy-management.qmd)

**[Digital Gating & State](articles/systems-mechanics/digital-gating-and-state.qmd)**: Digital infrastructure for hunts/ARGs/hybrid rooms; the digital mechanism-as-judge.

**[Digital Props](articles/space-props-materiality/digital-props.qmd)**: Embedded screens/microcontrollers; companion apps; diegetic interfaces / fake OS in IF.

*Distinct Voices*: see [Character Voice](articles/story-character-voice/character-voice.qmd)

**[Distributing Narrative Authority](articles/systems-mechanics/distributing-narrative-authority.qmd)**: The mechanisms that hand narrative authority around a table.

*Document Forgery*: see [Artefact Design & Document Production](articles/space-props-materiality/artefact-design-and-document-production.qmd)

*Dominant Strategy*: see [Decision Space & Choice Design](articles/systems-mechanics/decision-space-and-choice-design.qmd)

*Don't Prep Plots*: see [Prep Economy](articles/systems-mechanics/prep-economy.qmd)

*Dramatic Conflict*: see [Conflict Patterns](articles/story-character-voice/conflict-patterns.qmd)

*Dread Design*: see [Horror Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/horror-conventions.qmd)

*Drip-Feed*: see [Exposition & Subtext](articles/story-character-voice/exposition-and-subtext.qmd)

*Drop-In Drop-Out Play*: see [West Marches & the Open-Table Format](articles/structure-pacing/west-marches-and-the-open-table-format.qmd)

**[Dungeon & Spatial Topology](articles/space-props-materiality/dungeon-and-spatial-topology.qmd)**: The designed space; Jaquaying/Xandering; loops, connections, faction ecology.

*Dungeon Design*: see [Dungeon & Spatial Topology](articles/space-props-materiality/dungeon-and-spatial-topology.qmd)


## E

*Earned Emotion*: see [Emotional Beats & Investment](articles/story-character-voice/emotional-beats-and-investment.qmd)

*Elegance*: see [Elegance, Emergence & Randomness](articles/systems-mechanics/elegance-emergence-and-randomness.qmd)

**[Elegance, Emergence & Randomness](articles/systems-mechanics/elegance-emergence-and-randomness.qmd)**: Minimal rules / maximal behaviour; randomness types and mitigation.

*Embedded Electronics*: see [Digital Props](articles/space-props-materiality/digital-props.qmd)

*Emergence*: see [Elegance, Emergence & Randomness](articles/systems-mechanics/elegance-emergence-and-randomness.qmd)

*Emotional Aftercare*: see [Bleed, Aftercare & Debriefing](articles/players-social-dynamics/bleed-aftercare-and-debriefing.qmd)

**[Emotional Beats & Investment](articles/story-character-voice/emotional-beats-and-investment.qmd)**: Earning feeling; investment before stakes; the interactive multiplier.

**[Encounter & Challenge Design](articles/systems-mechanics/encounter-and-challenge-design.qmd)**: The encounter as a unit of challenge; budget maths; skill challenges.

*Encryption Puzzles*: see [Ciphers & Codes](articles/puzzles-clues-information/ciphers-and-codes.qmd)

*Endings*: see [Endings & Structural Closure](articles/structure-pacing/endings-and-structural-closure.qmd)

**[Endings & Structural Closure](articles/structure-pacing/endings-and-structural-closure.qmd)**: Multiple endings, earned closure, the live-game finale.

*Energy Curve*: see [Session Pacing & Energy Management](articles/structure-pacing/session-pacing-and-energy-management.qmd)

*Ensemble Convergence*: see [Parallel Threads & Convergence](articles/structure-pacing/parallel-threads-and-convergence.qmd)

*Environmental Narrative*: see [Environmental Storytelling & Setting as Character](articles/story-character-voice/environmental-storytelling-and-setting-as-character.qmd)

**[Environmental Storytelling & Setting as Character](articles/story-character-voice/environmental-storytelling-and-setting-as-character.qmd)**: Story through the world; setting as an active force.

*Epiphany*: see [Aha Moment](articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-aha-moment.qmd)

**[Episodic & Serialised Structure](articles/structure-pacing/episodic-and-serialised-structure.qmd)**: Episodic vs serialised; state persistence across instalments; release cadence.

*Episodic Design*: see [Episodic & Serialised Structure](articles/structure-pacing/episodic-and-serialised-structure.qmd)

**Epistemic Tier**: Analytical label for role/venue-differentiated knowledge in large live games (settled here as the canonical term; corpus flagged it as a label, not settled community usage).

*Escape Room Flow*: see [Escape Room Topologies](articles/structure-pacing/escape-room-topologies.qmd)

**[Escape Room Topologies](articles/structure-pacing/escape-room-topologies.qmd)**: Linear/open/multi-linear/hub-and-spoke rooms; why IF branching rarely survives a physical room.

*Eureka*: see [Aha Moment](articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-aha-moment.qmd)

**[Euro vs Ameritrash: The Two Design Poles](articles/systems-mechanics/euro-vs-ameritrash-the-two-design-poles.qmd)**: The two boardgame design poles and the hybrid era. Tabletop-only reference (Gate-C1).

*The Euro-Ameritrash Axis*: see [Euro vs Ameritrash: The Two Design Poles](articles/systems-mechanics/euro-vs-ameritrash-the-two-design-poles.qmd)

**[Exposition & Subtext](articles/story-character-voice/exposition-and-subtext.qmd)**: Delivering information without a lecture; the unsaid.

**[Extraction, Indexing & Meta-Puzzles](articles/puzzles-clues-information/extraction-indexing-and-meta-puzzles.qmd)**: Answers-as-data; the meta and its extraction mechanics.


## F

**[Fabrication & Sourcing](articles/space-props-materiality/fabrication-and-sourcing.qmd)**: The buy/make/commission decision; workshop tiers; 3D printing; print-on-demand.

*Facilitation Models*: see [GM Role Models & Stances](articles/players-social-dynamics/gm-role-models-and-stances.qmd)

*Facilitator Roles*: see [Host Roles & the Host-Cannot-Play Problem](articles/players-social-dynamics/host-roles-and-the-host-cannot-play-problem.qmd)

*Faction Clocks*: see [Progress Clocks & Faction State](articles/systems-mechanics/progress-clocks-and-faction-state.qmd)

**[Faction Design & Asymmetric Objectives](articles/players-social-dynamics/faction-design-and-asymmetric-objectives.qmd)**: Factions as teams-within-the-game; asymmetric objective frameworks.

*Faction Structure*: see [Faction Design & Asymmetric Objectives](articles/players-social-dynamics/faction-design-and-asymmetric-objectives.qmd)

*Failing Forward*: see [Try-Fail Cycles & Escalation](articles/structure-pacing/try-fail-cycles-and-escalation.qmd)

*Fair Play*: see [Cluing & Fairness](articles/puzzles-clues-information/cluing-and-fairness.qmd)

*Fair-Play Mystery*: see [Mystery & Detective Fiction](articles/story-character-voice/mystery-and-detective-fiction.qmd)

*False Bottoms*: see [Hidden Compartments & Reveal Mechanisms](articles/space-props-materiality/hidden-compartments-and-reveal-mechanisms.qmd)

**[Fantasy Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/fantasy-conventions.qmd)**: Magic-system design; trope use/subversion; prophecy.

*Fear Mechanics*: see [Horror Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/horror-conventions.qmd)

*Feeder*: see Feeder Answer

**Feeder Answer**: A component-puzzle answer that feeds a meta.

*Fiat vs Ruling*: see [Rulings vs Rules & the Authority Contract](articles/players-social-dynamics/rulings-vs-rules-and-the-authority-contract.qmd)

*Fiction-First Resolution*: see [Moves & the Fiction-Mechanic-Fiction Loop](articles/systems-mechanics/moves-and-the-fiction-mechanic-fiction-loop.qmd)

*Finale Design*: see [Endings & Structural Closure](articles/structure-pacing/endings-and-structural-closure.qmd)

*Format Spectrum*: see [Cooperative vs Adversarial Formats](articles/players-social-dynamics/cooperative-vs-adversarial-formats.qmd)

*Fragment Assembly*: see [Nonlinear Narrative Structures](articles/structure-pacing/nonlinear-narrative-structures.qmd)

*Fronts*: see [Progress Clocks & Faction State](articles/systems-mechanics/progress-clocks-and-faction-state.qmd)


## G

*Genre Contracts*: see [A Taxonomy of Genre Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/a-taxonomy-of-genre-conventions.qmd)

*Genre Conventions*: see [A Taxonomy of Genre Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/a-taxonomy-of-genre-conventions.qmd)

*The Genuine Dilemma*: see [Moral Dilemmas & Consequence Chains](articles/story-character-voice/moral-dilemmas-and-consequence-chains.qmd)

*German-Style vs American-Style*: see [Euro vs Ameritrash: The Two Design Poles](articles/systems-mechanics/euro-vs-ameritrash-the-two-design-poles.qmd)

*The GM as Social Role*: see [GM Role Models & Stances](articles/players-social-dynamics/gm-role-models-and-stances.qmd)

*GM Emulator*: see [Oracle & Solo-Play Resolution](articles/systems-mechanics/oracle-and-solo-play-resolution.qmd)

**[GM Role Models & Stances](articles/players-social-dynamics/gm-role-models-and-stances.qmd)**: The GM as a social role; the six stances and the authority gradient.

*GM Stances*: see [GM Role Models & Stances](articles/players-social-dynamics/gm-role-models-and-stances.qmd)

*GMless Authority*: see [Distributing Narrative Authority](articles/systems-mechanics/distributing-narrative-authority.qmd)

*Group Contract*: see [The Session Zero Playbook](articles/players-social-dynamics/the-session-zero-playbook.qmd)

*Group Size*: see [Team Sizes & the Bottleneck Problem](articles/players-social-dynamics/team-sizes-and-the-bottleneck-problem.qmd)


## H

*Handout Production*: see [Artefact Design & Document Production](articles/space-props-materiality/artefact-design-and-document-production.qmd)

*Hard Choices*: see [Moral Dilemmas & Consequence Chains](articles/story-character-voice/moral-dilemmas-and-consequence-chains.qmd)

*The Heist*: see [Heist & Caper Patterns](articles/story-character-voice/heist-and-caper-patterns.qmd)

**[Heist & Caper Patterns](articles/story-character-voice/heist-and-caper-patterns.qmd)**: The competence engine; crew roles; the plan and the reveal.

**[Hexcrawl & Pointcrawl](articles/structure-pacing/hexcrawl-and-pointcrawl.qmd)**: The hexcrawl as a complete exploration structure; the pointcrawl alternative.

**[Hidden Compartments & Reveal Mechanisms](articles/space-props-materiality/hidden-compartments-and-reveal-mechanisms.qmd)**: UV / heat / magnetic / layered-paper reveals; the reveal-as-state-change beat.

*Hidden Information*: see [Information Asymmetry: Hidden Information vs Hidden Roles](articles/players-social-dynamics/information-asymmetry-hidden-information-vs-hidden-roles.qmd)

*Hidden Roles*: see [Information Asymmetry: Hidden Information vs Hidden Roles](articles/players-social-dynamics/information-asymmetry-hidden-information-vs-hidden-roles.qmd)

*Hidden-Role Games*: see [Social Performance Genres](articles/systems-mechanics/social-performance-genres.qmd)

*Hint Delivery*: see [Hint Systems & Recovery](articles/puzzles-clues-information/hint-systems-and-recovery.qmd)

**[Hint Systems & Recovery](articles/puzzles-clues-information/hint-systems-and-recovery.qmd)**: Getting stuck and getting unstuck; pull/push/escalation.

*Hinting*: see [Hint Systems & Recovery](articles/puzzles-clues-information/hint-systems-and-recovery.qmd)

**[Historical Fiction](articles/story-character-voice/historical-fiction.qmd)**: Research balance; period voice; anachronism control; prejudice without endorsement.

**[Horror Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/horror-conventions.qmd)**: Fear mechanics; dread vs shock; sanity/death-state mechanics.

*Host Positions*: see [Host Roles & the Host-Cannot-Play Problem](articles/players-social-dynamics/host-roles-and-the-host-cannot-play-problem.qmd)

**[Host Roles & the Host-Cannot-Play Problem](articles/players-social-dynamics/host-roles-and-the-host-cannot-play-problem.qmd)**: The three host positions; whoever runs a social game cannot also play it fresh.

*Hunt Design*: see [Puzzle Hunt Craft](articles/puzzles-clues-information/puzzle-hunt-craft.qmd)

*Hunt Platforms*: see [Digital Gating & State](articles/systems-mechanics/digital-gating-and-state.qmd)

*Hunt Trust*: see [Designer-Community Trust in Long-Form Hunts](articles/players-social-dynamics/designer-community-trust-in-long-form-hunts.qmd)


## I

*The Iceberg*: see [Exposition & Subtext](articles/story-character-voice/exposition-and-subtext.qmd)

*Idiolect*: see [Character Voice](articles/story-character-voice/character-voice.qmd)

**[IF Graph Structures: A Taxonomy](articles/structure-pacing/if-graph-structures-a-taxonomy.qmd)**: Map of branching shapes: time cave, gauntlet, branch-and-bottleneck, hub-and-spoke, QBN.

**[IF Mechanics & Procedural Rhetoric](articles/systems-mechanics/if-mechanics-and-procedural-rhetoric.qmd)**: Mechanics in IF that carry meaning; the system as argument.

*Illusionism*: see [Sandbox, Situation & the Railroad Spectrum](articles/structure-pacing/sandbox-situation-and-the-railroad-spectrum.qmd)

*Immersion*: see [Theme, Immersion & Sensory Environment](articles/space-props-materiality/theme-immersion-and-sensory-environment.qmd)

*Incluing*: see [Exposition & Subtext](articles/story-character-voice/exposition-and-subtext.qmd)

*Inclusive Design*: see [Accessibility in Live & Interactive Games](articles/players-social-dynamics/accessibility-in-live-and-interactive-games.qmd)

**[Information Architecture](articles/puzzles-clues-information/information-architecture.qmd)**: Who knows what, when; the clue dependency graph.

**[Information Asymmetry: Hidden Information vs Hidden Roles](articles/players-social-dynamics/information-asymmetry-hidden-information-vs-hidden-roles.qmd)**: The structural choice of what to hide and from whom.

*Information Design*: see [Information Architecture](articles/puzzles-clues-information/information-architecture.qmd)

*Initiative*: see [Turn Structure & Action Economy](articles/systems-mechanics/turn-structure-and-action-economy.qmd)

*Input vs Output Randomness*: see [Elegance, Emergence & Randomness](articles/systems-mechanics/elegance-emergence-and-randomness.qmd)

*Interesting Decisions*: see [Decision Space & Choice Design](articles/systems-mechanics/decision-space-and-choice-design.qmd)

*Internal Logic*: see [Worldbuilding Patterns](articles/story-character-voice/worldbuilding-patterns.qmd)

*Intimate Scenework*: see [One-on-One Scene Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/one-on-one-scene-design.qmd)

*Invisible Ink*: see [Hidden Compartments & Reveal Mechanisms](articles/space-props-materiality/hidden-compartments-and-reveal-mechanisms.qmd)


## J

**[The Journal as Artefact](articles/story-character-voice/the-journal-as-artefact.qmd)**: The journal as durable output; voice under journaling pressure.

*Journaling as Output*: see [The Journal as Artefact](articles/story-character-voice/the-journal-as-artefact.qmd)

*Journaling Games*: see [Solo Journaling RPGs: Genre & Form](articles/story-character-voice/solo-journaling-rpgs-genre-and-form.qmd)

*Journaling Prompts*: see [Prompt Design in Solo Journaling](articles/story-character-voice/prompt-design-in-solo-journaling.qmd)


## K

*Kidlit Conventions*: see [Children's & YA Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/childrens-and-ya-conventions.qmd)

*Kinds of Puzzle*: see [A Taxonomy of Puzzles](articles/puzzles-clues-information/a-taxonomy-of-puzzles.qmd)

*Knowledge Distribution*: see [Information Architecture](articles/puzzles-clues-information/information-architecture.qmd)

*Knowledge Tier*: see Epistemic Tier


## L

*Legacy Games*: see [Cooperative & Legacy Genres](articles/systems-mechanics/cooperative-and-legacy-genres.qmd)

*Load-Bearing Theme*: see [Theme-Mechanism Integration](articles/systems-mechanics/theme-mechanism-integration.qmd)

*Lock Selection*: see [Lock Taxonomy](articles/space-props-materiality/lock-taxonomy.qmd)

**[Lock Taxonomy](articles/space-props-materiality/lock-taxonomy.qmd)**: Combination/key/directional/word/magnetic/electronic locks; reliability, reset, theme fit.

*Locks*: see [Lock Taxonomy](articles/space-props-materiality/lock-taxonomy.qmd)

*The Loop*: see [Time Loop Patterns](articles/structure-pacing/time-loop-patterns.qmd)

*Luck Management*: see [Elegance, Emergence & Randomness](articles/systems-mechanics/elegance-emergence-and-randomness.qmd)

*Ludonarrative Dissonance*: see [IF Mechanics & Procedural Rhetoric](articles/systems-mechanics/if-mechanics-and-procedural-rhetoric.qmd)


## M

*Machine-Checked Solutions*: see [Self-Resolving Puzzles](articles/puzzles-clues-information/self-resolving-puzzles.qmd)

*Magic-System Design*: see [Fantasy Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/fantasy-conventions.qmd)

**[Materials, Durability & Reset](articles/space-props-materiality/materials-durability-and-reset.qmd)**: Material palette; weatherproofing; the reset hierarchy and pre-run checklist.

*Meaningful Choice*: see [Branching Narrative Craft](articles/structure-pacing/branching-narrative-craft.qmd)

*Mechanic as Metaphor*: see [IF Mechanics & Procedural Rhetoric](articles/systems-mechanics/if-mechanics-and-procedural-rhetoric.qmd)

*Mechanic-Revelation Curve*: see [Teaching Through Play](articles/puzzles-clues-information/teaching-through-play.qmd)

**[Mechanical Resolution Types](articles/systems-mechanics/mechanical-resolution-types.qmd)**: The resolution method (d20/2d6/pools/FitD/diceless/cards); probability shape and table-feel.

*Mechanical Safety*: see [Safety Systems as Mechanical Layer](articles/systems-mechanics/safety-systems-as-mechanical-layer.qmd)

*Mechanism as Argument*: see [Theme-Mechanism Integration](articles/systems-mechanics/theme-mechanism-integration.qmd)

*Mechanism as Judge*: see [Self-Resolving Puzzles](articles/puzzles-clues-information/self-resolving-puzzles.qmd)

*Mechanism Families*: see [Boardgame Mechanism Vocabulary](articles/systems-mechanics/boardgame-mechanism-vocabulary.qmd)

*Megagame Faction Architecture*: see [Parallel Team Architectures](articles/players-social-dynamics/parallel-team-architectures.qmd)

*Meta*: see Meta-Puzzle

**Meta-Puzzle**: A puzzle whose inputs are other puzzles' answers (see Extraction, Indexing & Meta-Puzzles).

*Metapuzzle*: see Meta-Puzzle

*MG vs YA*: see [Children's & YA Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/childrens-and-ya-conventions.qmd)

**[Mixed-Ability Groups & Universal Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/mixed-ability-groups-and-universal-design.qmd)**: The seven Universal Design principles; one experience across abilities; redundant paths.

*Mixed-Engagement Design*: see [Spectator-Friendly Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/spectator-friendly-design.qmd)

**[Moral Dilemmas & Consequence Chains](articles/story-character-voice/moral-dilemmas-and-consequence-chains.qmd)**: Two-goods/two-bads choice; values not virtue; compounding consequence.

*The Move*: see PbtA Move

**[Moves & the Fiction-Mechanic-Fiction Loop](articles/systems-mechanics/moves-and-the-fiction-mechanic-fiction-loop.qmd)**: The home of the canonical **PbtA Move** (see that row); the fiction→trigger→roll→fiction loop.

*Multi-Generational Play*: see [Mixed-Ability Groups & Universal Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/mixed-ability-groups-and-universal-design.qmd)

*Multi-step Puzzle*: see [Extraction, Indexing & Meta-Puzzles](articles/puzzles-clues-information/extraction-indexing-and-meta-puzzles.qmd)

*Multi-Team Design*: see [Parallel Team Architectures](articles/players-social-dynamics/parallel-team-architectures.qmd)

*Multi-Thread Structure*: see [Parallel Threads & Convergence](articles/structure-pacing/parallel-threads-and-convergence.qmd)

*Multiple Endings*: see [Endings & Structural Closure](articles/structure-pacing/endings-and-structural-closure.qmd)

**[Mystery & Detective Fiction](articles/story-character-voice/mystery-and-detective-fiction.qmd)**: The mystery genre craft; fair-play cluing (story angle; mechanics in Cluing & Fairness).

*Mystery Hunt Design*: see [Puzzle Hunt Craft](articles/puzzles-clues-information/puzzle-hunt-craft.qmd)


## N

*Naming*: see [Naming Craft: Characters & Locations](articles/story-character-voice/naming-craft-characters-and-locations.qmd)

**[Naming Craft: Characters & Locations](articles/story-character-voice/naming-craft-characters-and-locations.qmd)**: Names as a worldbuilding signal; respectful, non-appropriative.

*Narrative Graph Shapes*: see [IF Graph Structures: A Taxonomy](articles/structure-pacing/if-graph-structures-a-taxonomy.qmd)

*Narrative Objects*: see [Artefact Design & Document Production](articles/space-props-materiality/artefact-design-and-document-production.qmd)

*Narrative Perspective*: see [Prose Patterns & Point of View](articles/story-character-voice/prose-patterns-and-point-of-view.qmd)

*Narrative Trigger*: see PbtA Move

*Narrator Contract*: see [Voice & Register Consistency](articles/story-character-voice/voice-and-register-consistency.qmd)

*NFC Tags*: see [QR & NFC Patterns](articles/space-props-materiality/qr-and-nfc-patterns.qmd)

*Node-Path Travel*: see [Hexcrawl & Pointcrawl](articles/structure-pacing/hexcrawl-and-pointcrawl.qmd)

*Non-Chronological Storytelling*: see [Nonlinear Narrative Structures](articles/structure-pacing/nonlinear-narrative-structures.qmd)

*Non-Linear Layout*: see [Dungeon & Spatial Topology](articles/space-props-materiality/dungeon-and-spatial-topology.qmd)

**[Nonlinear Narrative Structures](articles/structure-pacing/nonlinear-narrative-structures.qmd)**: Reverse chronology, frame, mosaic assembly; Kishōtenketsu, Jo-ha-kyū.

*Nonverbal Tutorial*: see [Teaching Through Play](articles/puzzles-clues-information/teaching-through-play.qmd)

*Noticing Puzzles*: see [Search, Observation & Lateral Thinking](articles/puzzles-clues-information/search-observation-and-lateral-thinking.qmd)

*The Novum*: see [Science Fiction Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/science-fiction-conventions.qmd)

**[NPC Craft & Voicing](articles/story-character-voice/npc-craft-and-voicing.qmd)**: Designing the supporting cast; the marker pair; LLM-NPC limits.


## O

**[One-on-One Scene Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/one-on-one-scene-design.qmd)**: The single-player/facilitator scene; consent and the power gap as load-bearing.

*Onomastics*: see [Naming Craft: Characters & Locations](articles/story-character-voice/naming-craft-characters-and-locations.qmd)

*Open Table*: see [West Marches & the Open-Table Format](articles/structure-pacing/west-marches-and-the-open-table-format.qmd)

**[Oracle & Solo-Play Resolution](articles/systems-mechanics/oracle-and-solo-play-resolution.qmd)**: Oracles as GM-substitute for solo/GMless play; the Chaos Factor.

*Oracle Systems*: see [Oracle & Solo-Play Resolution](articles/systems-mechanics/oracle-and-solo-play-resolution.qmd)


## P

*Padlock Taxonomy*: see [Lock Taxonomy](articles/space-props-materiality/lock-taxonomy.qmd)

**[Parallel Team Architectures](articles/players-social-dynamics/parallel-team-architectures.qmd)**: Convergent/competitive/hybrid/faction architectures for many teams at once.

**[Parallel Threads & Convergence](articles/structure-pacing/parallel-threads-and-convergence.qmd)**: Parallel storylines; connection/convergence types; converging without flattening.

*Party Games*: see [Social Performance Genres](articles/systems-mechanics/social-performance-genres.qmd)

*Pasted-On Theme*: see [Theme-Mechanism Integration](articles/systems-mechanics/theme-mechanism-integration.qmd)

**PbtA Move**: A resolution mechanic that bridges fiction and state.

*Perceptual Puzzles*: see [Search, Observation & Lateral Thinking](articles/puzzles-clues-information/search-observation-and-lateral-thinking.qmd)

*Period Fiction*: see [Historical Fiction](articles/story-character-voice/historical-fiction.qmd)

*Period Voice*: see [Historical Fiction](articles/story-character-voice/historical-fiction.qmd)

**[Physical Clue Formats](articles/space-props-materiality/physical-clue-formats.qmd)**: The envelope/booklet/card/container taxonomy and the unsealing beat.

**[Physical vs Digital Puzzle Artefacts](articles/space-props-materiality/physical-vs-digital-puzzle-artefacts.qmd)**: The five-modality taxonomy; url-rot; durability horizons.

*Physical-Digital Spectrum*: see [Physical vs Digital Puzzle Artefacts](articles/space-props-materiality/physical-vs-digital-puzzle-artefacts.qmd)

*Place as Character*: see [Environmental Storytelling & Setting as Character](articles/story-character-voice/environmental-storytelling-and-setting-as-character.qmd)

**[Playbook Design](articles/systems-mechanics/playbook-design.qmd)**: The playbook as bundled character identity.

*Playbooks*: see [Playbook Design](articles/systems-mechanics/playbook-design.qmd)

*Player Agency Spectrum*: see [Sandbox, Situation & the Railroad Spectrum](articles/structure-pacing/sandbox-situation-and-the-railroad-spectrum.qmd)

*Player Count*: see [Team Sizes & the Bottleneck Problem](articles/players-social-dynamics/team-sizes-and-the-bottleneck-problem.qmd)

*Player Motivation Frameworks*: see [Player Types & Casting](articles/players-social-dynamics/player-types-and-casting.qmd)

*Player Taxonomies*: see [Player Types & Casting](articles/players-social-dynamics/player-types-and-casting.qmd)

**[Player Types & Casting](articles/players-social-dynamics/player-types-and-casting.qmd)**: Bartle / Robin's Laws / Mixing Desk typologies as lenses, not boxes; casting.

**Players & Social Dynamics**: The social and interpersonal layer.

*Post-Play Debrief*: see [Bleed, Aftercare & Debriefing](articles/players-social-dynamics/bleed-aftercare-and-debriefing.qmd)

*POV*: see [Prose Patterns & Point of View](articles/story-character-voice/prose-patterns-and-point-of-view.qmd)

*The Pre-Game Agreement*: see [The Session Zero Playbook](articles/players-social-dynamics/the-session-zero-playbook.qmd)

**[Pre-Game Workshop Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/pre-game-workshop-design.qmd)**: Nordic calibration mechanics and relationship workshops before play.

*Pre-Larp Workshop*: see [Pre-Game Workshop Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/pre-game-workshop-design.qmd)

**[Prep Economy](articles/systems-mechanics/prep-economy.qmd)**: Prepping the reusable; situational over plotted prep; the overprep failure.

*Procedural Rhetoric*: see [IF Mechanics & Procedural Rhetoric](articles/systems-mechanics/if-mechanics-and-procedural-rhetoric.qmd)

*Progress Bar*: see Progress Clock

**Progress Clock**: A visual widget for tracking state changes.

**[Progress Clocks & Faction State](articles/systems-mechanics/progress-clocks-and-faction-state.qmd)**: The home of the canonical **Progress Clock** (see that row); offscreen change and faction state.

*Project Scoping*: see [Scope, Scale & Branching Depth](articles/structure-pacing/scope-scale-and-branching-depth.qmd)

*The Prompt as Mechanic*: see [Prompt Design in Solo Journaling](articles/story-character-voice/prompt-design-in-solo-journaling.qmd)

**[Prompt Design in Solo Journaling](articles/story-character-voice/prompt-design-in-solo-journaling.qmd)**: The prompt as the load-bearing unit; generative vs flat; failure modes.

*Prop Durability*: see [Materials, Durability & Reset](articles/space-props-materiality/materials-durability-and-reset.qmd)

*Prop Fabrication*: see [Fabrication & Sourcing](articles/space-props-materiality/fabrication-and-sourcing.qmd)

*Prop Sourcing*: see [Fabrication & Sourcing](articles/space-props-materiality/fabrication-and-sourcing.qmd)

*Props & Feelies*: see [Artefact Design & Document Production](articles/space-props-materiality/artefact-design-and-document-production.qmd)

**[Prose Patterns & Point of View](articles/story-character-voice/prose-patterns-and-point-of-view.qmd)**: Sentence rhythm; the POV taxonomy and tense.

*Prose Rhythm*: see [Prose Patterns & Point of View](articles/story-character-voice/prose-patterns-and-point-of-view.qmd)

*Pure Branching*: see Time Cave

*Puzzle Categories*: see [A Taxonomy of Puzzles](articles/puzzles-clues-information/a-taxonomy-of-puzzles.qmd)

*Puzzle Flow*: see [Clue Sequencing & Chains](articles/puzzles-clues-information/clue-sequencing-and-chains.qmd)

**[The Puzzle Hunt & ARG Tradition](articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-puzzle-hunt-and-arg-tradition.qmd)**: History and lineage of hunts and ARGs.

**[Puzzle Hunt Craft](articles/puzzles-clues-information/puzzle-hunt-craft.qmd)**: The hunt format: feeders, rounds, metas, test-solving.

*Puzzle Hunt History*: see [The Puzzle Hunt & ARG Tradition](articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-puzzle-hunt-and-arg-tradition.qmd)

*Puzzle Types*: see [A Taxonomy of Puzzles](articles/puzzles-clues-information/a-taxonomy-of-puzzles.qmd)

*Puzzlehunt Construction*: see [Puzzle Hunt Craft](articles/puzzles-clues-information/puzzle-hunt-craft.qmd)

**Puzzles, Clues & Information**: The cognitive loop of investigation and discovery.


## Q

**[QR & NFC Patterns](articles/space-props-materiality/qr-and-nfc-patterns.qmd)**: The physical-digital bridge; anti-spoiler gating; tag placement; connectivity fallbacks.

*QR Codes*: see [QR & NFC Patterns](articles/space-props-materiality/qr-and-nfc-patterns.qmd)


## R

*Reading Level*: see [Audience & Age-Targeting](articles/story-character-voice/audience-and-age-targeting.qmd)

*Relation Workshop*: see [Pre-Game Workshop Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/pre-game-workshop-design.qmd)

*Relationship Mechanics*: see [Romance & Relationships](articles/story-character-voice/romance-and-relationships.qmd)

*Repetition with Variation*: see [Time Loop Patterns](articles/structure-pacing/time-loop-patterns.qmd)

*Replay Value*: see [Replayability](articles/systems-mechanics/replayability.qmd)

**[Replayability](articles/systems-mechanics/replayability.qmd)**: Variable setup, asymmetry, legacy, metagame depth.

*Reset Narrative*: see [Time Loop Patterns](articles/structure-pacing/time-loop-patterns.qmd)

*Resetability*: see [Materials, Durability & Reset](articles/space-props-materiality/materials-durability-and-reset.qmd)

*The Reskin Test*: see [Theme-Mechanism Integration](articles/systems-mechanics/theme-mechanism-integration.qmd)

*Resolution Mechanics*: see [Mechanical Resolution Types](articles/systems-mechanics/mechanical-resolution-types.qmd)

*Reveals*: see [Hidden Compartments & Reveal Mechanisms](articles/space-props-materiality/hidden-compartments-and-reveal-mechanisms.qmd)

*Role Assignment*: see [Player Types & Casting](articles/players-social-dynamics/player-types-and-casting.qmd)

**[Romance & Relationships](articles/story-character-voice/romance-and-relationships.qmd)**: Romance arc beats; affection/flag tracking; NPC agency; consent design.

*Romance Routes*: see [Romance & Relationships](articles/story-character-voice/romance-and-relationships.qmd)

*Room Structure*: see [Escape Room Topologies](articles/structure-pacing/escape-room-topologies.qmd)

*Rotating Roster Campaign*: see [West Marches & the Open-Table Format](articles/structure-pacing/west-marches-and-the-open-table-format.qmd)

*RPG Design Families*: see [TTRPG Format Taxonomy](articles/systems-mechanics/ttrpg-format-taxonomy.qmd)

*Rule of Three*: see [Try-Fail Cycles & Escalation](articles/structure-pacing/try-fail-cycles-and-escalation.qmd)

*Rule Zero*: see [Rulings vs Rules & the Authority Contract](articles/players-social-dynamics/rulings-vs-rules-and-the-authority-contract.qmd)

*Rules-World Coupling*: see [System vs Setting](articles/systems-mechanics/system-vs-setting.qmd)

*Rulings Not Rules*: see [Rulings vs Rules & the Authority Contract](articles/players-social-dynamics/rulings-vs-rules-and-the-authority-contract.qmd)

**[Rulings vs Rules & the Authority Contract](articles/players-social-dynamics/rulings-vs-rules-and-the-authority-contract.qmd)**: Rulings-not-rules; Rule Zero and its abuse; authority held by table consent.

*Running vs Playing*: see [Host Roles & the Host-Cannot-Play Problem](articles/players-social-dynamics/host-roles-and-the-host-cannot-play-problem.qmd)


## S

**Safety Contract**: The umbrella concept: the social agreement on content and boundaries. The specific tools (X-Card, Lines and Veils, Script Change, Lookdown, OK Check-In, Cut/Brake) are distinct named techniques, **not** aliases to swap. A safety article must name them precisely (see Safety Tools as Design Layer).

**[Safety Systems as Mechanical Layer](articles/systems-mechanics/safety-systems-as-mechanical-layer.qmd)**: Safety carried in the rules (Trophy dice, Strings); the systems-side complement to Safety Tools (Family 4).

**[Safety Tools as Design Layer](articles/players-social-dynamics/safety-tools-as-design-layer.qmd)**: The safety toolkit as a design layer (X-Card, Script Change, Lookdown, etc.); see the Safety Contract umbrella term.

*Sandbox vs Railroad*: see [Sandbox, Situation & the Railroad Spectrum](articles/structure-pacing/sandbox-situation-and-the-railroad-spectrum.qmd)

**[Sandbox, Situation & the Railroad Spectrum](articles/structure-pacing/sandbox-situation-and-the-railroad-spectrum.qmd)**: The railroad-to-sandbox spectrum; prep situations not plots; the quantum ogre.

*Scan-to-Unlock*: see [QR & NFC Patterns](articles/space-props-materiality/qr-and-nfc-patterns.qmd)

*Scavenger Hunt*: see [Treasure & Scavenger Hunts](articles/puzzles-clues-information/treasure-and-scavenger-hunts.qmd)

**[Scene & Sequel in Interactive Fiction](articles/structure-pacing/scene-and-sequel-in-interactive-fiction.qmd)**: The scene/sequel micro-rhythm; the sequel as the reflection-and-choice beat.

*Scene Breaks*: see [Scene Structure & Transitions](articles/structure-pacing/scene-structure-and-transitions.qmd)

*Scene Craft*: see [Scene Structure & Transitions](articles/structure-pacing/scene-structure-and-transitions.qmd)

**[Scene Structure & Transitions](articles/structure-pacing/scene-structure-and-transitions.qmd)**: The beat-to-prose pipeline; cuts, transitions, scene breaks.

*Scene-Sequel*: see [Scene & Sequel in Interactive Fiction](articles/structure-pacing/scene-and-sequel-in-interactive-fiction.qmd)

**[Science Fiction Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/science-fiction-conventions.qmd)**: The hard/soft contract; the novum; diegetic interfaces.

*Scope Discipline*: see [Scope, Scale & Branching Depth](articles/structure-pacing/scope-scale-and-branching-depth.qmd)

**[Scope, Scale & Branching Depth](articles/structure-pacing/scope-scale-and-branching-depth.qmd)**: Estimating scale; how branching depth multiplies scope; cutting to finish.

*The Score*: see [Heist & Caper Patterns](articles/story-character-voice/heist-and-caper-patterns.qmd)

**[Search, Observation & Lateral Thinking](articles/puzzles-clues-information/search-observation-and-lateral-thinking.qmd)**: The noticing / perceptual faculty.

*Secondary-World Craft*: see [Fantasy Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/fantasy-conventions.qmd)

**[Self-Resolving Puzzles](articles/puzzles-clues-information/self-resolving-puzzles.qmd)**: The apparatus confirms the solution itself.

*Self-Validating Puzzles*: see [Self-Resolving Puzzles](articles/puzzles-clues-information/self-resolving-puzzles.qmd)

*Sensory Design*: see [Theme, Immersion & Sensory Environment](articles/space-props-materiality/theme-immersion-and-sensory-environment.qmd)

*Serial Narrative*: see [Episodic & Serialised Structure](articles/structure-pacing/episodic-and-serialised-structure.qmd)

*Server-Side Answer Checking*: see [Digital Gating & State](articles/systems-mechanics/digital-gating-and-state.qmd)

*Session 0*: see [The Session Zero Playbook](articles/players-social-dynamics/the-session-zero-playbook.qmd)

*The Session Arc*: see [Session Pacing & Energy Management](articles/structure-pacing/session-pacing-and-energy-management.qmd)

**[Session Pacing & Energy Management](articles/structure-pacing/session-pacing-and-energy-management.qmd)**: The multi-hour arc; energy variation; the mid-session sag and its cures.

*Session Rhythm*: see [Session Pacing & Energy Management](articles/structure-pacing/session-pacing-and-energy-management.qmd)

**[The Session Zero Playbook](articles/players-social-dynamics/the-session-zero-playbook.qmd)**: The pre-game agreement; expectations/tone/safety/logistics calibration.

*Setting Construction*: see [Worldbuilding Patterns](articles/story-character-voice/worldbuilding-patterns.qmd)

*Setup and Payoff*: see [Emotional Beats & Investment](articles/story-character-voice/emotional-beats-and-investment.qmd)

*SF Conventions*: see [Science Fiction Conventions](articles/story-character-voice/science-fiction-conventions.qmd)

*Shared Authorship*: see [Distributing Narrative Authority](articles/systems-mechanics/distributing-narrative-authority.qmd)

*Show Control*: see [Cue Management & GM Station](articles/space-props-materiality/cue-management-and-gm-station.qmd)

*Show vs Tell*: see [Exposition & Subtext](articles/story-character-voice/exposition-and-subtext.qmd)

*Single-Player Mode*: see [Solo Modes](articles/systems-mechanics/solo-modes.qmd)

*Skins*: see [Playbook Design](articles/systems-mechanics/playbook-design.qmd)

*Smart Prep*: see [Prep Economy](articles/systems-mechanics/prep-economy.qmd)

*Smart Props*: see [Digital Props](articles/space-props-materiality/digital-props.qmd)

*Social Deduction*: see [Trust, Conformity & Social Pressure](articles/players-social-dynamics/trust-conformity-and-social-pressure.qmd)

**[Social Performance Genres](articles/systems-mechanics/social-performance-genres.qmd)**: Boardgame genres where the people are the game (genre view; psychology is Family 4).

*Solo Audience Scene*: see [One-on-One Scene Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/one-on-one-scene-design.qmd)

**[Solo Journaling RPGs: Genre & Form](articles/story-character-voice/solo-journaling-rpgs-genre-and-form.qmd)**: The prompt → response → artefact form; oracle and epistolary lineages.

**[Solo Modes](articles/systems-mechanics/solo-modes.qmd)**: Designing a solo opponent for a multiplayer boardgame.

*Solvability*: see [Cluing & Fairness](articles/puzzles-clues-information/cluing-and-fairness.qmd)

**Space, Props & Materiality**: The physical and sensory layer.

*Spatial Layout*: see [Dungeon & Spatial Topology](articles/space-props-materiality/dungeon-and-spatial-topology.qmd)

**[Spectator-Friendly Design](articles/players-social-dynamics/spectator-friendly-design.qmd)**: Designing for observers; drop-in/drop-out; mixed engagement levels.

*Splitting and Reconvergence*: see [Team Splitting Strategies](articles/players-social-dynamics/team-splitting-strategies.qmd)

*Spoiler Stratification*: see [Canon Management](articles/story-character-voice/canon-management.qmd)

*Stakes & Escalation*: see [Conflict Patterns](articles/story-character-voice/conflict-patterns.qmd)

*Stakes Ladder*: see [Try-Fail Cycles & Escalation](articles/structure-pacing/try-fail-cycles-and-escalation.qmd)

*Story Bible*: see [Canon Management](articles/story-character-voice/canon-management.qmd)

*Story Structure Frameworks*: see [Beat Taxonomies & Craft Models](articles/structure-pacing/beat-taxonomies-and-craft-models.qmd)

**Story, Character & Voice**: The narrative and aesthetic layer.

**Structure & Pacing**: The temporal and macro-rhythmic framework.

*Stuck Recovery*: see [Hint Systems & Recovery](articles/puzzles-clues-information/hint-systems-and-recovery.qmd)

*Sub-Team Design*: see [Team Splitting Strategies](articles/players-social-dynamics/team-splitting-strategies.qmd)

*Sudden Insight*: see [Aha Moment](articles/puzzles-clues-information/the-aha-moment.qmd)

*Supporting Cast*: see [NPC Craft & Voicing](articles/story-character-voice/npc-craft-and-voicing.qmd)

*Swain Structure*: see [Scene & Sequel in Interactive Fiction](articles/structure-pacing/scene-and-sequel-in-interactive-fiction.qmd)

**[System vs Setting](articles/systems-mechanics/system-vs-setting.qmd)**: The coupling between rules and world; the hackability/reskin test.

**Systems & Mechanics**: The engine and resolution layer.


## T

*Task Resolution*: see [Mechanical Resolution Types](articles/systems-mechanics/mechanical-resolution-types.qmd)

**[Teaching Through Play](articles/puzzles-clues-information/teaching-through-play.qmd)**: Teaching the rules by demonstration, not instruction.

**[Team Sizes & the Bottleneck Problem](articles/players-social-dynamics/team-sizes-and-the-bottleneck-problem.qmd)**: Size thresholds; the one-puzzle-one-bottleneck crowding problem.

**[Team Splitting Strategies](articles/players-social-dynamics/team-splitting-strategies.qmd)**: Splitting a large group into parallel sub-teams (Ringelmann, reconvergence).

*The Telltale Model*: see [Episodic & Serialised Structure](articles/structure-pacing/episodic-and-serialised-structure.qmd)

*Theme*: see [Theme, Immersion & Sensory Environment](articles/space-props-materiality/theme-immersion-and-sensory-environment.qmd)

**[Theme, Immersion & Sensory Environment](articles/space-props-materiality/theme-immersion-and-sensory-environment.qmd)**: Making a built space feel like a real world and keeping the player there.

**[Theme-Mechanism Integration](articles/systems-mechanics/theme-mechanism-integration.qmd)**: Boardgame theme coupling and procedural rhetoric (the systems sibling of Theme/Immersion, Family 5).

*The Three Pillars*: see [Encounter & Challenge Design](articles/systems-mechanics/encounter-and-challenge-design.qmd)

**Time Cave**: A narrative topology where every choice branches.

**[Time Loop Patterns](articles/structure-pacing/time-loop-patterns.qmd)**: Loop arc phases; knowledge-as-progression; exit types.

*Time-Skips*: see [Scene Structure & Transitions](articles/structure-pacing/scene-structure-and-transitions.qmd)

*Toponymy*: see [Naming Craft: Characters & Locations](articles/story-character-voice/naming-craft-characters-and-locations.qmd)

*Track*: see Progress Clock

*Traitor Mechanics*: see [Cooperative vs Adversarial Formats](articles/players-social-dynamics/cooperative-vs-adversarial-formats.qmd)

**[Treasure & Scavenger Hunts](articles/puzzles-clues-information/treasure-and-scavenger-hunts.qmd)**: The outdoor / distributed trail tradition.

*Treasure Hunt*: see [Treasure & Scavenger Hunts](articles/puzzles-clues-information/treasure-and-scavenger-hunts.qmd)

*Trope Subversion*: see [Tropes, Archetypes & Variations](articles/story-character-voice/tropes-archetypes-and-variations.qmd)

**[Tropes, Archetypes & Variations](articles/story-character-voice/tropes-archetypes-and-variations.qmd)**: Archetypes; tropes as tools; subversion techniques (underpins the genre articles).

**[Trust, Conformity & Social Pressure](articles/players-social-dynamics/trust-conformity-and-social-pressure.qmd)**: The hub: designing genuine social pressure on a foundation of consent (Asch/Milgram, social-deduction lineage).

**[Try-Fail Cycles & Escalation](articles/structure-pacing/try-fail-cycles-and-escalation.qmd)**: The four-outcome failure engine; escalation; failure as branch.

**[TTRPG Format Taxonomy](articles/systems-mechanics/ttrpg-format-taxonomy.qmd)**: Map of TTRPG design traditions by design DNA.

*TTRPG Traditions*: see [TTRPG Format Taxonomy](articles/systems-mechanics/ttrpg-format-taxonomy.qmd)

*Turn Order*: see [Turn Structure & Action Economy](articles/systems-mechanics/turn-structure-and-action-economy.qmd)

**[Turn Structure & Action Economy](articles/systems-mechanics/turn-structure-and-action-economy.qmd)**: Who acts when and how much; downtime and its cures.


## U

*Universal vs Bespoke Systems*: see [System vs Setting](articles/systems-mechanics/system-vs-setting.qmd)


## V

*Variability*: see [Replayability](articles/systems-mechanics/replayability.qmd)

*Verifiability Compact*: see [Designer-Community Trust in Long-Form Hunts](articles/players-social-dynamics/designer-community-trust-in-long-form-hunts.qmd)

**[Voice & Register Consistency](articles/story-character-voice/voice-and-register-consistency.qmd)**: The narrator contract; register shifts; branch-drift audit.

*Voice Drift*: see [Voice & Register Consistency](articles/story-character-voice/voice-and-register-consistency.qmd)

*Voice Markers*: see [Character Voice](articles/story-character-voice/character-voice.qmd)

*Voicing NPCs*: see [NPC Craft & Voicing](articles/story-character-voice/npc-craft-and-voicing.qmd)


## W

*Weatherproofing*: see [Materials, Durability & Reset](articles/space-props-materiality/materials-durability-and-reset.qmd)

*Web App Gating*: see [Digital Gating & State](articles/systems-mechanics/digital-gating-and-state.qmd)

**[West Marches & the Open-Table Format](articles/structure-pacing/west-marches-and-the-open-table-format.qmd)**: Player-driven open-table play; persistent shared map; coordination at scale.

*Who Knows What*: see [Information Asymmetry: Hidden Information vs Hidden Roles](articles/players-social-dynamics/information-asymmetry-hidden-information-vs-hidden-roles.qmd)

*Who-Knows-What-When*: see [Information Architecture](articles/puzzles-clues-information/information-architecture.qmd)

*Whodunit*: see [Mystery & Detective Fiction](articles/story-character-voice/mystery-and-detective-fiction.qmd)

*Wilderness Exploration*: see [Hexcrawl & Pointcrawl](articles/structure-pacing/hexcrawl-and-pointcrawl.qmd)

*Workshop Tiers*: see [Fabrication & Sourcing](articles/space-props-materiality/fabrication-and-sourcing.qmd)

*World Consistency*: see [Worldbuilding Patterns](articles/story-character-voice/worldbuilding-patterns.qmd)

*World-Affordance Puzzles*: see [Search, Observation & Lateral Thinking](articles/puzzles-clues-information/search-observation-and-lateral-thinking.qmd)

**[Worldbuilding Patterns](articles/story-character-voice/worldbuilding-patterns.qmd)**: Internal logic, Sanderson's First Law, the iceberg, branching world-state.

*Wretched & Alone Games*: see [Solo Journaling RPGs: Genre & Form](articles/story-character-voice/solo-journaling-rpgs-genre-and-form.qmd)

*Writing as the Game*: see [The Journal as Artefact](articles/story-character-voice/the-journal-as-artefact.qmd)


## Y

*Yes-But / No-And*: see [Try-Fail Cycles & Escalation](articles/structure-pacing/try-fail-cycles-and-escalation.qmd)

*Yes/No Oracle*: see [Oracle & Solo-Play Resolution](articles/systems-mechanics/oracle-and-solo-play-resolution.qmd)
